name: Flag Collection
short_description: Collect flags, feel flags, love flags.
detailed_description:
• All countries in the world, various organizations, civilizations annihilated in history, etc.
    Thousands of flags are included!

  • View the details of the flags freely

  • Most of the flags use vector graphics, which can support unlimited resolution!
    Save to any resolution you want!

  • Unlock more than 90 flag patterns as your achievements! (More flag achievements will be added in the future!)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean
